lines: South Africa 0–1 Canada yesterday — nobody here had either of those teams, so let's all collectively ignore that and move on like it never happened.

TODAY'S BIG ONE: Netherlands vs Morocco is a sweepstake bloodbath — Al's Netherlands face the Morocco four-pack of Butters, Callum, Jim, and Wilmot. Four people. One team. Beautiful chaos. Someone's getting their heart broken and someone else is getting a free ride.

Ellis — joint 9th, Argentina and Paraguay still alive — Paraguay are up against Germany today. Classic Ellis, quietly sitting there with two actual footballing nations while New Zealand and South Korea already fucked off home. Don't get comfortable, fuck.

Butters and Carter are locked on 49pts apiece at the top, and Butters has FOUR teams still in — Portugal, Morocco, Norway, AND DR Congo. That's not a sweepstake entry, that's a hostage situation. Someone sort this man out.

WATCH TODAY: If Morocco beat Netherlands, Butters, Callum, Jim and Wilmot all bank points while Al watches his Dutch dreams dissolve — and given Al is sitting 5th on 33pts already sweating, that would be genuinely hilarious.
